hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo 'BLOCCATO: sei sul branch main. Apri un feature branch prima di modificare file.'; exit 2; fi
echo '--- Test suite automatica ---' && cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && make tests 2>&1 | tail -30

echo '=== easy - Granular Synthesis Engine ===' && echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" && echo "Ultimo tag: $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo 'nessun tag')" && echo "Test: $(cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && python -m pytest --co -q 2>/dev/null | tail -1)"
